query:
INSERT INTO idealCustomerProfiles (
  userId, serviceId, name,
  introduction, fears, hopesDreams, pains, goals, buyingTriggers,
  createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  7110001, 1470001,
  'Life Coach Dream Buyer',
  'A dedicated life coach who has been in practice for 1-3 years but struggles to generate consistent leads and fill their calendar with paying clients.',
  'Fear of being seen as unsuccessful, fear of running out of money, fear that coaching is not a viable business',
  'Building a 6-figure coaching practice, having a waitlist of ideal clients, being recognized as a top coach in their niche',
  'Inconsistent income, struggling to get consistent leads, not knowing how to market effectively, feast-or-famine cycle',
  'Consistent 5-figure months, a full calendar of ideal clients, a repeatable marketing system that works on autopilot',
  'Seeing other coaches succeed with a clear system, hitting a financial low point, getting a referral from a trusted peer',
  NOW(), NOW()
);
